title: codereview-pass1-edhoc-initiator
description: Reviewed lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:791-810 after context_3/TH_4 update for A_3. Findings: P4 buffer size could be tighter (64B sufficient); P3 inconsistent TH_3 computation style vs compute_th(); no P0/P1/P2. Fixed P4 comment alignment. Test vectors in python match post-fix.
